title: Document updated TUI observability cues
description: Refresh the TUI operator documentation so it describes the live status bar, in-progress elapsed timers, stale lease indicator, and current-cycle deferred visibility introduced by this feature.
acceptance_criteria: `docs/tui.md` documents the live status bar fields and updated bead-list observability cues.
Documentation reflects that deferred indicators are current-cycle-only rather than persistent across arbitrary future refreshes.
Documentation language matches the implemented TUI behavior and avoids describing unimplemented countdowns or persistent deferred state.
conflict_risks:
state.py was not in the original `expected_files` list, but the change is additive (new field only) with no risk to sibling beads modifying the same area.
No conflicts expected. Only `app.py` was modified; `state.py`'s `status_panel_text()` method is no longer called from `_update_status_panel()` but remains intact for any other callers.
